apihelp-query+checkuser-summary: Hubi ciwaannada IP ee uu isticmaalo isticmaale la bixiyay ama magacyada isticmaalayaasha ee uu isticmaalo ciwaan IP la bixiyay.
apihelp-query+checkuser-summary-api-disa: '''API-kan waxaa joojiyay maamulka goobta. Weydiinta API-ga ma soo celin doonto wax xog ah.''' {{int:apihelp-query+checkuser-summary}}
apihelp-query+checkuser-paramvalue-reque: Soo hel ciwaanka IP ee isticmaale la beegsaday.
Soo hel ficillada uu sameeyay ciwaanka IP la beegsaday ama xadka.
Soo hel isticmaalayaasha ka yimid ciwaanka IP la beegsaday ama xadka.
apihelp-query+checkuser-param-target: Magaca isticmaalaha, ciwaanka IP, ama xadka CIDR la hubinayo.
apihelp-query+checkuser-param-timecond: Xadka waqtiga xogta isticmaalaha (sida "-2 weeks" ama "2 weeks ago").
apihelp-query+checkuser-param-xff: Isticmaal xogta XFF halkii laga isticmaali lahaa ciwaanka IP.
apihelp-query+checkuserlog-param-target: Isticmaalaha la hubiyay, ciwaanka IP, ama xadka CIDR.
apihelp-query+checkuserformattedblockinf: Soo celi faahfaahinta xannibaadda oo qaabaysan ee xannibaadaha guud ee saameeya isticmaalaha hadda.
apihelp-query+globalcontributions-summar: Muuji wax ka beddeladii ugu dambeeyay ee dhammaan wiki-yada ee isticmaalaha diiwaangashan la bixiyay.
apihelp-query+globalcontributions-param-: Magaca isticmaalaha ee la raadinayo (waa inuusan noqon IP).
Meesha laga sii wado tirinta si loo sii wado taxitaanka.
apihelp-query+globalcontributions-exampl: Muuji wax ka beddeladii ugu dambeeyay ee dhammaan wiki-yada ee isticmaalaha la bixiyay.
Muuji wax ka beddeladii ugu dambeeyay ee dhammaan wiki-yada ee isticmaalaha la bixiyay laga bilaabo meel sii wadis, iyadoo leh xad gaar ah.
apierror-checkuser-timelimit: Waa inaad isticmaashaa xadka waqtiga saxda ah (sida "-2 toddobaad" ama "2 toddobaad ka hor").
apierror-checkuser-nosuchuser: Ma jiro isticmaale leh magacan isticmaale
apierror-checkuser-disabled: Weydiinta API-ga ee 'checkuser' waxaa joojiyay maamulka goobta.
checkuser-api-help-paramvalue-direction-: Ku tax kii ugu da'da weyn hore. Fiiro gaar ah: $1from waa inuu ka horreeyaa $1to.
Ku tax kii ugu cusub hore (caadi ahaan). Fiiro gaar ah: $1from waa inuu ka dambeeyaa $1to.
checkuser-api-useragent-clienthints-revi: Isticmaale $1 ma aha qoraaga dib u eegista $2
checkuser-api-useragent-clienthints-mapp: Khariidadaha tilmaamaha macmiilka ayaa horey u jira $1 $2
checkuser-api-useragent-clienthints-call: $1 $2 aad buu u duugoobay si loogu oggolaado in la diiwaangeliyo xogta tilmaamaha macmiilka
checkuser-api-useragent-clienthints-expl: {{SITENAME}} waxay ururisaa xogta tilmaamaha macmiilka ee user-agent si ay uga caawiso la socodka burburinta iyo xadgudubka. Faahfaahin dheeraad ah ka eeg https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Extension:CheckUser/Client_Hints
apihelp-logout-param-checkuserclienthint: Xogta tilmaamaha macmiilka ee la socda codsiyada ApiLogout. Kaliya isticmaal gudaha nidaamka.
checkuser-ip-auto-reveal-expiry-invalid: Mudada auto-reveal ee la bixiyay waa khalad.
checkuser-ip-auto-reveal-missing-permiss: Ma lihid oggolaanshaha loo baahan yahay si aad u isticmaasho muujinta IP-ga si toos ah.
checkuser-suggestedinvestigations-case-u: Aqoonsiga kiiska ee la bixiyay ma jiro.
Astaanta baaritaannada la soo jeediyay lama shidin
rest-module-checkuser.v0-desc:
REST API ee qalabka CheckUser. 
Eeg [dukumentiga kordhinta CheckUser] (https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Extension:CheckUser).
checkuser-rest-param-desc-username: Magaca isticmaalaha laga soo saarayo faahfaahinta
checkuser-rest-request-desc-userinfo: Jirka codsiga ee lagu soo saarayo macluumaadka Kaarka Macluumaadka Isticmaalaha
checkuser-rest-response-desc-userinfo: Jawaab ay ku jiraan xog faahfaahsan oo ku saabsan hawlaha isticmaalaha, kuwa dadweynaha iyo kuwa xaddidan
checkuser-rest-property-desc-local-regis: Waqtiga diiwaangelinta maxalliga ah ee isticmaalaha
checkuser-rest-property-desc-first-regis: Waqtiga ugu horreeya ee diiwaangelinta isticmaalaha ee dhammaan wikiyada
checkuser-rest-property-desc-user-page-e: In uu jiro iyo in kale bogga isticmaalaha
checkuser-rest-property-desc-blocked-or-: In isticmaaluhu hadda si aan xad lahayn uga xanniban yahay maxalli ahaan ama caalami ahaan, ama akoonkiisu la qufulay
checkuser-rest-property-desc-groups: Liis HTML ah oo la qaabeeyey oo muujinaya kooxaha maxalliga ah ee isticmaalaha
checkuser-rest-property-desc-total-edit-: Wadarta tirada wax ka beddellada maxalliga ah ee isticmaalaha
checkuser-rest-property-desc-global-edit: Tirada guud ee wax ka beddellada caalamiga ah ee isticmaalaha
checkuser-rest-property-desc-global-grou: Liis HTML ah oo habaysan oo kooxaha isticmaalaha caalamiga ah
checkuser-rest-property-desc-global-rest: Xaaladda xannibaadda caalamiga ah (tusaale ahaan, qufulan, la xannibay)
Waqtiga la saaray xadidaada caalamiga ah
checkuser-rest-property-desc-active-wiki: Khariidad u dhexeysa wikiyada uu isticmaaluhu ku leeyahay hawl tafatir iyo URL-yada bogagga wax ku biirinta ee u dhigma
checkuser-rest-property-desc-checkuser-c: Tirada baaritaannada CheckUser ee lagu sameeyay isticmaalahan
checkuser-rest-property-desc-checkuser-l: Waqtiga baaritaankii ugu dambeeyay ee CheckUser lagu sameeyay isticmaalahan
checkuser-rest-property-desc-suggested-i: Tirada kiisaska baaritaanka la soo jeediyay ee la xiriira isticmaalahan
checkuser-rest-property-desc-can-access-: Inuu fuliyaha heli karo cinwaannada IP-ga ku meelgaarka ah ee koontada isticmaalaha
checkuser-rest-property-desc-active-bloc: Tirada xannibaadaha firfircoon ee ku jira wiki-ga maxalliga ah
checkuser-rest-property-desc-active-loca: Tirada guud ee xannibaadaha maxalliga ah ee firfircoon dhammaan wikiyada
checkuser-rest-property-desc-past-blocks: Tirada xannibaadihii hore ee ku jiray wiki-ga maxalliga ah
checkuser-rest-property-desc-temp-accoun: Liis ka kooban laba tiro oo isku xigta [ugu yar, ugu badan] oo matalaya kala duwanaanta tirada akoonnada ku meelgaarka ah ee firfircoon ee ku jira cinwaan kasta oo IP ah oo uu isticmaaluhu adeegsaday
checkuser-rest-param-desc-name: Magaca isticmaalaha loo raadinayo xaaladda xannibaadda ama qufulka
checkuser-rest-response-desc-userinfo-bl: Jawaab ka kooban tilmaamaha xaaladda xannibaadda ama qufulka isticmaalaha
checkuser-rest-property-desc-should-show: Inuu isticmaaluhu si aan xad lahayn uga xanniban yahay maxalli ahaan ama caalami ahaan, ama la qufulay
checkuser-rest-param-desc-temp-account-n: Magaca akoonka ku meelgaarka ah ee la raadinayo
checkuser-rest-param-desc-limit-ips: Tirada ugu badan ee cinwaannada IP-ga la soo celinayo
checkuser-rest-response-desc-temp-accoun: Jawaab ka kooban cinwaannada IP-ga ee la xiriira magaca akoonka ku meelgaarka ah
checkuser-rest-property-desc-ips: Liiska cinwaannada IP-ga uu adeegsaday akoonka ku meelgaarka ah
checkuser-rest-property-desc-ip-item: Cinwaanka IP-ga qaabka IPv4 ama IPv6
checkuser-rest-property-desc-auto-reveal: Inuu muujinta tooska ah ee akoonnada ku meelgaarka ah u shaqaynayo fuliyaha
checkuser-rest-param-desc-limit-temp-acc: Tirada ugu badan ee akoonnada ku meelgaarka ah ee la soo celinayo
checkuser-rest-response-desc-temp-accoun: Jawaab ka kooban akoonnada ku meelgaarka ah ee wax ka beddelay iyagoo ka isticmaalaya cinwaanka IP-ga la bixiyay
checkuser-rest-param-desc-batch-users: Khariidad u dhexeysa magacyada isticmaalayaasha ku meelgaarka ah iyo aqoonsiyada dib u eegista/diiwaanka/shaandhada xadgudubka ee la codsaday
checkuser-rest-request-desc-batch: Codsiga ah oo ka kooban khariidad u dhexeysa magacyada isticmaalayaasha ku meelgaarka ah iyo aqoonsiyada dib u eegista/diiwaanka/shaandhada xadgudubka ee la codsaday
checkuser-rest-request-property-desc-use: Khariidad u dhexeysa magacyada isticmaalayaasha ku meelgaarka ah iyo xuduudahooda
Xuduudaha lagu soo ceshanayo IP-yada isticmaalaha ku meelgaarka ah ee gaarka ah
checkuser-rest-request-property-desc-rev: Liiska aqoonsiyada dib u eegista la raadinayo
checkuser-rest-request-property-desc-abu: Liiska aqoonsiyada diiwaanka Xadgudubka Shaandhaynta la raadinayo
checkuser-rest-request-property-desc-las: In lagu daro IP-gii ugu dambeeyay ee la isticmaalay jawaabta
checkuser-rest-response-desc-batch: Jawaab ka kooban cinwaannada IP-ga oo loo qoondeeyay akoonnada ku meelgaarka ah ee la bartilmaameedsaday iyo aqoonsiyada la codsaday
checkuser-rest-property-desc-ip-data: Xogta IP-ga ee la xiriirta akoonka ku meelgaarka ah
checkuser-rest-property-desc-rev-ips: Khariidad u dhexeysa aqoonsiyada dib u eegista iyo cinwaannada IP-ga, ama aan waxba ahayn marka aan la codsan aqoonsiyo dib u eegis ah. Khariidaddu waxay ka tagaysaa aqoonsiyada dhacay.
checkuser-rest-property-desc-ip-or-null: Cinwaanka IP-ga ama aan waxba ahayn
checkuser-rest-property-desc-log-ips: Khariidad u dhexeysa aqoonsiyada diiwaanka iyo cinwaannada IP-ga, ama aan waxba ahayn marka aan la codsan aqoonsiyada diiwaanka. Khariidaddu waxay ka tagaysaa aqoonsiyada dhacay.
checkuser-rest-property-desc-abuse-log-i: Khariidad u dhexeysa aqoonsiyada diiwaanka Xadgudubka Shaandhaynta iyo cinwaannada IP-ga, ama aan waxba ahayn marka aan la codsan aqoonsiyada diiwaanka Xadgudubka Shaandhaynta. Khariidaddu waxay ka tagaysaa aqoonsiyada dhacay.
checkuser-rest-property-desc-last-used-i: IP-gii ugu dambeeyay ee isticmaaluhu adeegsaday, haddii la codsaday
checkuser-rest-response-desc-connected-t: Jawaab ka kooban akoonnada ku meelgaarka ah ee wax ka beddelay iyagoo isticmaalaya isla cinwaannada IP-ga sida akoonka ku meelgaarka ah ee la bartilmaameedsaday
checkuser-rest-property-desc-connected-a: Liiska magacyada akoonnada ku meelgaarka ah ee xiriirka leh
checkuser-rest-property-desc-ips-used-co: Tirada cinwaannada IP-ga uu adeegsaday akoonka ku meelgaarka ah ee la bartilmaameedsaday
checkuser-rest-request-desc-update-case: Codsi ah oo lagu cusboonaysiinayo xaaladda kiis baaritaan oo la soo jeediyay
checkuser-rest-response-desc-update-case: Jawaab ka kooban faahfaahinta kiiska baaritaan ee la soo jeediyay ee la cusboonaysiiyay
checkuser-rest-property-desc-formatted-r: Farriinta sababta xaaladda oo qaabaysan si loo soo bandhigo
checkuser-rest-param-desc-case-status-in: Xaaladda cusub ee lagu dabaqayo kiiska (furan, la xaliyay, ama aan sax ahayn)
checkuser-rest-param-desc-case-id-input: Aqoonsiga gaarka ah ee kiiska baaritaan ee la soo jeediyay
checkuser-rest-param-desc-clienthints-ty: Nooca dhacdada la diiwaangelinayo, oo ah dib u eegis ama diiwaan gaar ah
checkuser-rest-param-desc-clienthints-id: Aqoonsiga gaarka ah ee dhacdada dib u eegista ama diiwaanka gaarka ah
checkuser-rest-param-desc-clienthints-fu: Liiska faahfaahsan ee noocyada buuxa ee summadaha wakiilka isticmaalaha
checkuser-rest-param-desc-clienthints-ua: Xarigga nooca buuxa ee wakiilka isticmaalaha ee duugoobay
checkuser-rest-request-desc-clienthints: Jirka codsi ah oo ka kooban xogta tilmaamaha macmiilka
checkuser-rest-response-desc-clienthints: Jawaab muujinaysa kaydinta guusha leh ee tilmaamaha macmiilka
checkuser-rest-property-desc-clienthints: Farriin sharxaysa in tilmaamaha macmiilka si guul leh loo kaydiyay
checkuser-rest-request-desc-csrf: Jirka codsi ah oo ka kooban calaamadda CSRF.
checkuser-rest-endpoint-summary-update-c: Cusboonaysii xaaladda kiiska baaritaan ee la soo jeediyay iyo sababta
checkuser-rest-endpoint-desc-update-case: Waxay cusboonaysiisaa xaaladda iyo sababta kiiska baaritaan ee la soo jeediyay.
checkuser-rest-endpoint-desc-userinfo: Waxay soo celisaa macluumaadka ku saabsan hawlaha isticmaalaha ee dadweynaha iyo kuwa xaddidan.
checkuser-rest-endpoint-desc-userinfo-bl: Waxay soo celisaa xaaladda xannibaadda maxalliga ah iyo tan caalamiga ah iyo xaaladda qufulka ee isticmaalaha.
checkuser-rest-endpoint-summary-temp-acc: Hel cinwaannada IP-ga ee akoonka ku meelgaarka ah
checkuser-rest-endpoint-desc-temp-accoun: Waxay soo celisaa cinwaannada IP-ga ee la xiriira magaca akoonka ku meelgaarka ah.
checkuser-rest-endpoint-summary-temp-acc: Hel akoonnada ku meelgaarka ah ee cinwaanka IP-ga
checkuser-rest-endpoint-desc-temp-accoun: Waxay soo celisaa akoonnada ku meelgaarka ah ee wax ka beddelay iyagoo ka isticmaalaya cinwaan IP-ga la bixiyay.
checkuser-rest-endpoint-summary-batch-te: Hel cinwaannada IP-ga ee koox akoonno ku meelgaar ah
checkuser-rest-endpoint-desc-batch-temp-: Waxay soo celisaa cinwaannada IP-ga ee loo qoondeeyay liiska magacyada isticmaalayaasha ku meelgaarka ah, iyo diiwaanka/ aqoonsiyada diiwaanka xadgudub.
checkuser-rest-endpoint-summary-connecte: Hel akoonnada ku meelgaarka ah ee xiriirka leh
checkuser-rest-endpoint-desc-connected-t: Waxay soo celisaa akoonnada kale ee ku meelgaarka ah ee wax ka beddelay iyagoo isticmaalaya isla cinwaannada IP-ga sida akoonka ku meelgaarka ah ee la bixiyay.
checkuser-rest-endpoint-summary-clienthi: Abuur tilmaamaha macmiilka ee wakiilka isticmaalaha
checkuser-rest-endpoint-desc-clienthints: Waxay abuurtaa xogta tilmaamaha macmiilka ee wakiilka isticmaalaha ee dib u eegis ama dhacdo diiwaan ah oo la bixiyay.
